EmailTemplate.name: AN [Perm] - Interview invite candidate
EmailTemplate.subject: Your interview with Alliance Nursing
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WELCOME TO ALLIANCE NURSING.
{!Candidate.FirstName}, welcome to Alliance Nursing. You are now ready to get go!
Your day-to-day with us is managed through the Alliance Connect app.
And as always, if you have any questions or concerns you can always call our friendly staff on 1300 034 494.
We are so thrilled to have you onboard!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
